title: CIFE Notification 2026 - Apply Offline for Young Professional II Posts
description: The Central Institute of Fisheries Education (CIFE) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 01 Young Professional II Posts. Interested and eligible candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their Post-graduation, M.Sc., can apply for the CIFE Notification 2026 . The interested applicants can apply in offline mode.
